channel.title: Flexera Software LLC — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Flexera Software LLC (flexera).

item.title: CVE-2026-4027 · 7.1 HIGH — FlexNet Manager Suite Attachment File Disclosure
item.description: A security vulnerability has been identified in FlexNet Manager Suite 2025 R1 and R2 that could allow unauthorized access to attachment files due to insufficient access control.

item.title: CVE-2026-4026 · 8.7 HIGH — FlexNet Manager Suite Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
item.description: A security vulnerability has been identified in FlexNet Manager Suite 2025 R1 that could allow an authenticated user with read-only access to account settings to escalate their privileges to Administrator level.

item.title: CVE-2025-12418 · 5.6 MEDIUM — Potential Denial of Service in Supported Versions of Revenera InstallShield
item.description: Potential Denial of Service issue in all supported versions of Revenera InstallShield version 2025 R1, 2024 R2, 2023 R2, and prior. When e.g., a local administrator performs an uninstall, a symlink may get followed on removal of a user writeable conf…

item.title: CVE-2024-14012 · 7.3 HIGH — Potential Privilege Escalation in Revenera InstallShield 2023 R1
item.description: Potential privilege escalation issue in Revenera InstallShield version 2023 R1 running a renamed Setup.exe on Windows. When a local administrator executes a renamed Setup.exe, the MPR.dll may get loaded from an insecure location and can result in a p…

item.title: CVE-2024-7562 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: A potential elevated privilege issue has been reported with InstallShield built Standalone MSI setups having multiple InstallScript custom actions configured. All supported versions (InstallShield 2023 R2, InstallShield 2022 R2 and InstallShield 2021…

item.title: CVE-2021-41528 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Improper authorization related to Import / Export interfaces on RISC Platform
item.description: An error when handling authorization related to the import / export interfaces on the RISC Platform prior to the saas-2021-12-29 release can potentially be exploited to access the import / export functionality with low privileges.

item.title: CVE-2021-41527 · 2.3 LOW — 2FA bypass on the RISC Platform
item.description: An error related to the 2-factor authorization (2FA) on the RISC Platform prior to the saas-2021-12-29 release can potentially be exploited to bypass the 2FA. The vulnerability requires that the 2FA setup hasn’t been completed.

item.title: CVE-2023-29080 · 8.5 HIGH — Privilege escalation in InstallShield
item.description: Potential privilege escalation vulnerability in Revenera InstallShield versions 2022 R2 and 2021 R2 due to adding InstallScript custom action to a Basic MSI or InstallScript MSI project extracting few binaries to a predefined writable folder during i…

item.title: CVE-2024-2658 · 8.5 HIGH — Local privilege escalation in FlexNet Publisher
item.description: A misconfiguration in lmadmin.exe of FlexNet Publisher versions prior to 2024 R1 (11.19.6.0) allows the OpenSSL configuration file to load from a non-existent directory. An unauthorized, locally authenticated user with low privileges can potentially…

item.title: CVE-2023-29081 · 5.5 MEDIUM — InstallShield Symlink Vulnerability Affecting Suite Project Setups
item.description: A vulnerability has been reported in Suite Setups built with versions prior to InstallShield 2023 R2. This vulnerability may allow locally authenticated users to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) condition when handling move operations on local, tempor…

item.title: CVE-2021-41526
item.description: A vulnerability has been reported in the windows installer (MSI) built with InstallScript custom action. This vulnerability may allow privilege escalation when invoked ‘repair’ of the MSI which has an InstallScript custom action.

item.title: CVE-2019-8963 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A Denial of Service (DoS) vulnerability was discovered in FlexNet Publisher's lmadmin 11.16.5, when doing a crafted POST request on lmadmin using the web-based tool.

item.title: CVE-2017-6894 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: A vulnerability exists in FlexNet Manager Suite releases 2015 R2 SP3 and earlier (including FlexNet Manager Platform 9.2 and earlier) that affects the inventory gathering components and can be exploited by local users to perform certain actions with…

item.title: CVE-2021-41525
item.description: An issue related to modification of otherwise restricted files through a locally authenticated attacker exists in FlexNet inventory agent and inventory beacon versions 2020 R2.5 and prior.

item.title: CVE-2020-12083
item.description: An elevated privileges issue related to Spring MVC calls impacts Code Insight v7.x releases up to and including 2020 R1 (7.11.0-64).

item.title: CVE-2020-12082
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting issue impacts certain areas of the Web UI for Code Insight v7.x releases up to and including 2020 R1 (7.11.0-64).

item.title: CVE-2020-12080
item.description: A Denial of Service vulnerability has been identified in FlexNet Publisher's lmadmin.exe version 11.16.6. A certain message protocol can be exploited to cause lmadmin to crash.

item.title: CVE-2020-12081
item.description: An information disclosure vulnerability has been identified in FlexNet Publisher lmadmin.exe 11.14.0.2. The web portal link can be used to access to system files or other important files on the system.

item.title: CVE-2019-8961
item.description: A Denial of Service vulnerability related to stack exhaustion has been identified in FlexNet Publisher lmadmin.exe 11.16.2. Because the message reading function calls itself recursively given a certain condition in the received message, an unauthenti…

item.title: CVE-2019-8960
item.description: A Denial of Service vulnerability related to command handling has been identified in FlexNet Publisher lmadmin.exe version 11.16.2. The message reading function used in lmadmin.exe can, given a certain message, call itself again and then wait for a f…

item.title: CVE-2013-3494
item.description: A Code Execution Vulnerability exists in UMPlayer 0.98 in wintab32.dll due to insufficient path restrictions when loading external libraries. which could let a malicious user execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2013-3942
item.description: Potplayer prior to 1.5.39659: DLL Loading Arbitrary Code Execution Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2013-3489
item.description: Buffer overflow in Media Player Classic - Home Cinema (MPC-HC) before 1.7.0 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted RealMedia .rm file

item.title: CVE-2013-3488
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow in Media Player Classic - Home Cinema (MPC-HC) before 1.7.0.7858 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted MPEG-2 Transport Stream (M2TS) file.

item.title: CVE-2013-0739
item.description: Chamilo 1.9.4 has XSS due to improper validation of user-supplied input by the chat.php script.

item.title: CVE-2013-0738
item.description: Chamilo 1.9.4 has Multiple XSS and HTML Injection Vulnerabilities: blog.php and announcements.php.

item.title: CVE-2013-0725
item.description: ERDAS ER Viewer 13.0 has dwmapi.dll and irml.dll libraries arbitrary code execution vulnerabilities

item.title: CVE-2013-3486
item.description: IrfanView FlashPix Plugin 4.3.4 0 has an Integer Overflow Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2013-3493
item.description: XnView 2.03 has an integer overflow vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2013-3492
item.description: XnView 2.03 has a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2012-4919
item.description: Gallery Plugin1.4 for WordPress has a Remote File Include Vulnerability

item.title: CVE-2013-0737
item.description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in BoltWire 3.5 and earlier allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the fieldnames parameter.

item.title: CVE-2013-3246
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow in xnview.exe in XnView before 2.03 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted image layer in an XCF file.

item.title: CVE-2013-3247
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in xnview.exe in XnView before 2.03 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted RLE compressed layer in an XCF file.

item.title: CVE-2013-3932
item.description: SQL injection vulnerability in the Jomres (com_jomres) component before 7.3.1 for Joomla! allows remote authenticated users with the "Business Manager" permission to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the id parameter in an editProfile action to admi…

item.title: CVE-2013-3931
item.description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the Jomres (com_jomres) component before 7.3.1 for Joomla! allows remote authenticated users with the "Business Manager" permission to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the property_name parameter, re…

item.title: CVE-2013-3937
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in xnview.exe in XnView before 2.13 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via the biBitCount field in a BMP file.

item.title: CVE-2013-3939
item.description: xnview.exe in XnView before 2.13 does not properly handle RLE strip lengths during processing of RGB files, which allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via the RLE strip size field in a RGB file, which leads to an unexpected sign extensio…

item.title: CVE-2013-3941
item.description: Xjp2.dll in XnView before 2.13 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via (1) the Csiz parameter in a SIZ marker, which triggers an incorrect memory allocation, or (2) the lqcd field in a QCD marker in a crafted JPEG2000 file, which leads…

item.title: CVE-2013-3944
item.description: Stack-based buffer overflow in the MrSID plugin (MrSID.dll) before 4.37 for IrfanView allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via an IMAGE tag.

item.title: CVE-2013-3945
item.description: The MrSID plugin (MrSID.dll) before 4.37 for IrfanView allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a nband tag.

item.title: CVE-2013-3946
item.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in the MrSID plugin (MrSID.dll) before 4.37 for IrfanView allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a levels header.

item.title: CVE-2013-3935
item.description: Cross-site request forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Opsview before 4.4.1 and Opsview Core before 20130522 allows remote attackers to hijack the authentication of administrators for requests that change the administrator password via unspecified vector…

item.title: CVE-2013-3936
item.description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Opsview before 4.4.1 and Opsview Core before 20130522 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML.

item.title: CVE-2019-8956
item.description: In the Linux Kernel before versions 4.20.8 and 4.19.21 a use-after-free error in the "sctp_sendmsg()" function (net/sctp/socket.c) when handling SCTP_SENDALL flag can be exploited to corrupt memory.

item.title: CVE-2018-20034
item.description: A Denial of Service vulnerability related to adding an item to a list in lmgrd and vendor daemon components of FlexNet Publisher version 11.16.1.0 and earlier allows a remote attacker to send a combination of messages to lmgrd or the vendor daemon, c…

item.title: CVE-2018-20032
item.description: A Denial of Service vulnerability related to message decoding in lmgrd and vendor daemon components of FlexNet Publisher version 11.16.1.0 and earlier allows a remote attacker to send a combination of messages to lmgrd or the vendor daemon, causing t…

item.title: CVE-2018-20031
item.description: A Denial of Service vulnerability related to preemptive item deletion in lmgrd and vendor daemon components of FlexNet Publisher version 11.16.1.0 and earlier allows a remote attacker to send a combination of messages to lmgrd or the vendor daemon, c…

item.title: CVE-2018-20033
item.description: A Remote Code Execution vulnerability in lmgrd and vendor daemon components of FlexNet Publisher version 11.16.1.0 and earlier could allow a remote attacker to corrupt the memory by allocating / deallocating memory, loading lmgrd or the vendor daemon…

item.title: CVE-2018-5819
item.description: An error within the "parse_sinar_ia()" function (internal/dcraw_common.cpp) within LibRaw versions prior to 0.19.1 can be exploited to exhaust available CPU resources.
